job_description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a passionate and motivated MERN Stack Developer to join Global Surf Digital Media LLC (https://www.globalsurf.ae/). The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in developing modern web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js. You will be responsible for building scalable web applications, developing RESTful APIs, creating responsive user interfaces, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality digital solutions.

Job Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain full-stack web applications using MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, and Node.js.
  • Build responsive and user-friendly interfaces using React.js, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), and Tailwind CSS.
  • Develop, integrate, and maintain RESTful APIs and backend services.
  • Design, manage, and optimize MongoDB databases for performance and scalability.
  • Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms using JWT and role-based access control.
  • Integrate third-party APIs and external services as required.
  • Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve frontend and backend issues.
  • Write clean, reusable, scalable, and well-documented code following industry best practices.
  • Collaborate with designers, project managers, and other developers to deliver project requirements.
  • Participate in code reviews, testing, and continuous improvement of development processes.
  • Optimize applications for performance, security, scalability, and SEO best practices.
  • Deploy and maintain applications on cloud platforms such as Vercel, Netlify, or similar environments.
  • Manage source code using Git and follow collaborative development workflows.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • 6 months to 2 years of experience in full-stack web development using the MERN stack.
  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, Node.js, and Express.js.
  • Good understanding of MongoDB, Mongoose, and database design concepts.
  • Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs.
  • Familiarity with asynchronous programming, Promises, and API integration.
  • Experience with React Hooks, Context API, and component-based architecture.
  • Proficiency in Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3, and responsive web design.
  • Knowledge of authentication and authorization using JWT.
  • Understanding of web security concepts including XSS, CSRF, CORS, and OWASP best practices.
  • Experience with Git, GitHub/GitLab, and version control workflows.
  • Knowledge of deployment and hosting platforms such as Vercel, Netlify, or cloud services.
  • Understanding of SEO fundamentals and web performance optimization techniques.
  • Strong analytical, debugging, problem-solving, communication, and teamwork skills.
  • Experience with Next.js and TypeScript.
  • Familiarity with GraphQL.
  • Basic understanding of Docker and CI/CD workflows.
  • Experience integrating payment gateways and third-party services.
  • Knowledge of testing frameworks such as Jest or React Testing Library.

How to Apply

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at talent@globalsurf.ae.
summary: A MERN Stack Developer with 6 months to 2 years of experience is needed to build scalable web applications, develop APIs, and collaborate with cross-functional teams. The role requires proficiency in JavaScript, React, Node.js, and MongoDB.

job_description:
About Us

Cloudium Software is a fast-growing tech company headquartered in Florida, with offices in Cochin and Vizag. We deliver cutting-edge digital solutions to industries like healthcare, insurance, and automotive. Our mission is to help businesses transform digitally, offering custom-built services for SMBs and startups. www.cloudium.io

About the Role

  • Role: Assoc. Project Manager
  • Work Mode: Onsite (Monday to Friday)
  • Job Location: Visakhapatnam / Kochi

Key Responsibilities:

  • Engage with stakeholders to understand and document business needs and requirements.
  • Maintain and prioritize requirements backlog in collaboration with stakeholders.
  • Translate business requirements into detailed user stories and acceptance criteria.
  • Ensure the engineering team clearly understands requirements and acceptance criteria.
  • Act as the primary point of contact for requirement clarifications and delivery coordination.
  • Plan, manage, and track project timelines, deliverables, and milestones.
  • Coordinate and facilitate regular project meetings, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives.
  • Identify and mitigate project risks and issues.
  • Communicate project status and updates to stakeholders regularly.
  • Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope.
  • Define user acceptance criteria and collaborate with QA teams to ensure thorough testing and quality assurance processes.
  • Continuously seek opportunities to improve processes and efficiency.

Qualifications and Skillsets Required:

  • Strong expertise in Agile methodologies and the Scrum framework.
  • Strong hands-on experience with Jira and Confluence.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, user story writing, and interpersonal skills.
  • 4–8 years of relevant experience in Technical Project Management.
  • Proven experience as a Project Manager in a software development environment.
  • Technical background or understanding of software development processes.

Contact:

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at daya.m@cloudium.io.
summary: Cloudium Software seeks an Assoc. Project Manager with 4-8 years of experience in technical project management, Agile/Scrum expertise, and proficiency in Jira/Confluence to lead software development projects.

job_description:
Business Development Executive

Location: Kochi Experience: 2–3 Years Number of Openings: 2 Employment Type: Full-time

About the Company

We are a fast-growing, innovation-led technology company focused on helping businesses accelerate growth through Retail Digital Transformation, AI Automation, Agentic AI solutions, and IT Staffing services. We work with businesses across global markets to improve customer experience, streamline operations, and scale delivery capabilities through technology and skilled talent.

Role Summary

As a Business Development Executive, you will play a critical role in generating new business opportunities through outbound prospecting, lead qualification, and relationship building. You will identify potential clients, initiate conversations, understand customer needs, and schedule qualified meetings for senior sales or business leadership teams.

Key Responsibilities

  • Execute outbound campaigns via cold calling, email outreach, LinkedIn prospecting, and digital channels.
  • Connect with decision-makers in retail, e-commerce, technology, and related sectors.
  • Generate qualified leads and schedule meetings for the sales leadership team.
  • Promote awareness of core services: Retail Digital Transformation, AI Automation, Agentic AI, and IT Staffing.
  • Research companies, industries, and buying signals to identify high-potential opportunities.
  • Maintain CRM records with accurate contact details and activity notes.
  • Collaborate with marketing and leadership teams to align outreach with campaigns and priorities.
  • Support account mapping, prospect list building, and sales pipeline development.
  • Follow up with prospects through structured nurture and re-engagement campaigns.
  • Share market feedback to refine messaging and outreach strategies.

Core Requirements

  • 2–3 years of experience in business development, inside sales, or B2B lead generation.
  • Proven success in outbound prospecting via calls, emails, and LinkedIn.
  • Strong verbal and written communication skills in English.
  • Understanding of B2B technology/services-based selling.
  • Ability to work in a target-driven environment with strong organizational skills.
  • Confidence engaging with managers, directors, and decision-makers.
  • Self-motivated and capable of working independently or in cross-functional teams.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in IT services, staffing, digital transformation, SaaS, or tech solutions.
  • Exposure to retail technology, automation, AI, or workforce solutions.
  • Familiarity with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, or similar tools.
  • Experience supporting sales in UK, Europe, GCC, or North American markets.
  • Basic understanding of consultative selling and solution-based outreach.

What You’ll Gain

  • Opportunity to work in a fast-growing tech/digital services company in Kochi.
  • Exposure to high-demand areas like Retail Digital Transformation, AI Automation, and Agentic AI.
  • Growth opportunities into Senior Business Development, Account Management, or Sales roles.
  • Collaboration with leadership on strategic growth initiatives and market expansion.

Contact: Send your resume to hr@2hatslogic.com with the subject line "Business Development Executive".
summary: A Business Development Executive in Kochi will generate new business opportunities through outbound prospecting and lead qualification, focusing on technology services like AI Automation and Retail Digital Transformation. Requires 2–3 years of B2B sales experience and strong communication skills.

job_description:
Business Development Executive (Software Products & IT Services)

Location: Infopark-Kochi Experience Required: 2-5 Years

About the Role

We are seeking a highly motivated Business Development Executive to drive sales of our Insurance Broker ERP platform and generate opportunities for custom software development services. The role encompasses lead generation, prospect engagement, product demonstrations, proposal coordination, and business closure support.

Key Responsibilities

Product Sales - Identify and engage insurance brokers, intermediaries, TPAs, and related organizations. - Schedule product demonstrations and presentations. - Build and maintain a pipeline of qualified prospects. - Follow up with decision-makers and influencers. - Assist in preparing proposals and commercial offers.

IT Services Sales - Generate leads for custom software development, web applications, mobile applications, AI solutions, ERP systems, and digital transformation projects. - Build relationships with prospective clients across India and overseas markets. - Coordinate with technical teams during requirement discussions.

Marketing - Maintain CRM and sales pipeline reports. - Conduct email campaigns and LinkedIn outreach. - Participate in industry events, exhibitions, and networking activities. - Identify partnership opportunities and channel partners.

Requirements

  • 2–5 years of experience in B2B sales, software sales, SaaS sales, or IT services sales.
  • Strong communication and presentation skills.
  • Comfortable interacting with CXOs and business owners.
  • Experience in CRM tools, LinkedIn prospecting, and lead generation.
  • Knowledge of insurance industry processes is a plus.

Compensation

  • Fixed Retainer + Attractive Incentives
  • Growth opportunity into Sales Manager / Business Head role.

Contact: Share your updated resume at hr@techtaliya.com
summary: Seeking a Business Development Executive with 2-5 years of B2B sales experience to drive sales of Insurance Broker ERP and generate leads for custom software development services. Responsibilities include lead generation, product demonstrations, and partnership development.

job_title: Business Development Executive – Lead Generation & Event Listings
job_description:
Business Development Executive – Lead Generation & Event Listings

Job Summary:

We are seeking an experienced and dynamic Business Development professional for our Event Ticket Booking Platform. The candidate will be responsible for generating leads, onboarding event organizers, managing event listings on the portal, and building strong relationships with clients to drive business growth. The ideal candidate should possess strong communication skills, relationship management abilities, and a proactive approach toward achieving business targets.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Generate leads and identify potential event organizers, promoters, and partners.
  • Develop and maintain relationships with event organizers and stakeholders.
  • Convert leads into business opportunities and close partnerships.
  • Coordinate with clients for event onboarding and ensure smooth event listing on the portal.
  • Manage and oversee event listings, updates, schedules, and promotional activities on the platform.
  • Conduct market research to identify new business opportunities and industry trends.
  • Achieve monthly and quarterly business targets related to lead generation and event onboarding.
  • Collaborate with Digital marketing and operations teams for campaign execution and event promotions.
  • Prepare reports on sales activities, lead status, and business performance.
  • Represent the company at networking events, exhibitions, and industry meetings when required.

Required Skills & Competencies:

  • Strong communication and presentation skills.
  • Excellent interpersonal and relationship-building abilities.
  • Strong negotiation and convincing skills.
  • Ability to work independently and achieve targets.
  • Good knowledge of CRM tools, MS Office, and online platforms.
  • Problem-solving mindset with attention to detail.
  • Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.

Preferred Requirements:

  • Prior experience in event management, ticketing platforms, digital marketplaces, or business development roles.
  • Experience handling client onboarding and portal management is an added advantage.
  • Understanding of the events ecosystem and event promotion strategies.

What We Expect:

  • Self-motivated and target-oriented professional.
  • Strong networking capabilities.
  • Passion for events, sales, and customer engagement.

Contact: For inquiries, please email your resume to career@aabasoft.com.
summary: Seeking a Business Development Executive to generate leads, onboard event organizers, and manage listings on a ticket platform. Requires strong communication, CRM skills, and 2-4 years of experience.

job_description:
Job Title: Lock Desk Analyst – Mortgage

Job Summary: We are seeking a detail-oriented and analytical Lock Desk Analyst to join our US Mortgage Operations team. This role is responsible for managing the loan pricing and rate lock process, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and timely execution in alignment with investor and secondary market guidelines.

Key Responsibilities: - Process and monitor rate lock requests, re-locks, extensions, and changes. - Ensure loan pricing is accurate and consistent with client policy and investor guidelines. - Maintain accurate data in the Loan Origination System (LOS) and Pricing Tools. - Communicate effectively with loan officers, processors, and secondary market team. - Track lock expirations and proactively notify stakeholders. - Assist in identifying and resolving discrepancies or pricing issues. - Support audits by ensuring the pricing accuracy (discount points / Fees) and compliance documentation (disclosures - LE and CD). - Stay updated with market changes, pricing policies, and investor guidelines.

Qualifications & Skills: Eligibility Criteria: - Education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Business Administration, Economics, or a related field. - Experience: 1–2 years in mortgage operations, pricing desk, or lock desk preferred.

Skills Required: - Strong analytical and numerical skills. - Familiarity with loan pricing engines (e.g., Optimal Blue, Encompass, Polly) is a plus. - Proficient in MS Excel and data management tools. - High attention to detail and time sensitivity. - Good communication and teamwork skills. - Willingness to work night shifts to support US-based operations is mandatory.

How to Apply: Interested candidates should send their resumes to careers@qcverify.com. If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at hr@qcverify.com.
summary: Manages loan pricing and rate locks for US mortgage operations, ensuring accuracy and compliance. Requires 1-2 years of mortgage operations experience and proficiency in loan pricing tools.

job_description:
Job Title: Databricks Developer / Data Engineer Experience Required: 5+ Years

Job Summary We are seeking an experienced Databricks Developer with 5+ years of experience in data engineering, analytics, and dashboard development. The ideal candidate should possess strong expertise in Databricks, including its dashboarding capabilities and AI-powered features, along with hands-on experience in Power BI.

Key Responsibilities - Design, develop, and optimise data solutions using Databricks. - Build and maintain interactive dashboards and reports within Databricks and Power BI. - Leverage Databricks AI and advanced analytics features to derive business insights. - Develop and manage ETL/ELT pipelines for large-scale data processing. - Collaborate with business stakeholders to gather requirements and translate them into technical solutions. - Ensure data quality, governance, and performance optimisation across data platforms. - Support data integration and reporting initiatives across multiple business functions.

Required Skills & Qualifications - 5+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Business Intelligence, or related fields. - Strong hands-on experience with Databricks. - Experience developing dashboards and reports using Databricks and/or Power BI. - Knowledge of Databricks AI capabilities and advanced analytics features. - Strong SQL and data modelling skills. - Experience with data transformation, data warehousing, and ETL processes. - Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.

Preferred Skills - Experience with Power BI visualisation and reporting. - Knowledge of Solar Energy, PV (Photovoltaic), or BESS (Battery Energy Storage Systems) domains. - Familiarity with cloud platforms such as Azure, AWS, or GCP. - Understanding of modern data architecture and data governance practices.

Contact: Share your resume at hr@icodebees.com
summary: Experienced Databricks Developer with 5+ years in data engineering, analytics, and dashboard development. Requires expertise in Databricks, Power BI, and ETL/ELT pipelines for large-scale data solutions.

job_description:
Role: Business Development Specialist

We are seeking a high-energy Business Development Specialist with a proven track record of breaking into and scaling within the US Market. This is a "Hunter" role where you will be responsible for the end-to-end sales lifecycle, from initial US-focused outreach and networking to closing high-value IT service deals.

Responsibilities - US Outreach & Prospecting: Execute strategic cold outreach (email, LinkedIn, calls) tailored to US business culture and professional standards. - Pipeline Management: Build and maintain a healthy pipeline of qualified meetings. Ensure high conversion rates from "initial contact" to "proposal sent." - High-Value Closing: Lead negotiations and close complex, high-value IT service deals, aligning with company profit margins. - Networking: Leverage digital platforms and virtual events to build a strong network of US-based decision-makers (CTOs, CEOs, VPs of Engineering). - CRM Excellence: Maintain accurate CRM records with up-to-date lead data, communication history, and sales forecasts. - Technical Consultation: Bridge clients and technical teams by articulating IT processes, terminologies, and project delivery frameworks.

Skills Required - US Market Expertise: Minimum 5+ years selling IT services/software to the US market. - Communication: Mastery of persuasive English for oral presentations and written proposals. - Technical Literacy: Strong grasp of IT terms (SDLC, Agile, Cloud Services, SaaS, Staff Augmentation) and ability to explain them to non-technical stakeholders. - Sales Tech Stack: Proficiency in Zoho CRM and lead generation tools (LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, ZoomInfo). - Team Collaboration: Proven teamwork with technical leads for solution architecting.

Contact: Share your resume at careers@ileafsolutions.com.
summary: A high-energy Business Development Specialist with 5+ years of US IT sales experience, skilled in closing high-value deals and leveraging technical expertise for client solutions.

job_description:
Tricta Technologies (P) Ltd

Location: 4th Floor Module No-7(a), Gayatri Roof Top, Technopark Campus, Trivandrum – 695581 Website: https://www.tricta.com Closing Date: 28 June 2026 Job Published: 07 June 2026 Contact Email: hr@tricta.com

Full Stack Developer (Microservices Architecture)

Employment Type: Full-Time Experience Required: 3–8 Years Location: Technopark, Trivandrum / Remote

About the Role

We are seeking a skilled Full Stack Developer with experience in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable applications using Microservices Architecture. The ideal candidate should have strong expertise in frontend, backend, cloud deployment, APIs, containerization, and DevOps practices.

Key Responsibilities

Backend Development - Design and develop scalable microservices using Node.js or Python. - Develop RESTful APIs and GraphQL services. - Implement authentication and authorization using JWT, OAuth2, Keycloak, etc. - Design event-driven architectures using Kafka, RabbitMQ, or MQTT. - Optimize application performance, security, and scalability.

Frontend Development - Develop responsive web applications using React.js, Angular, Vue.js, or Next.js. - Integrate frontend applications with backend APIs. - Implement reusable UI components and state management solutions. - Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness.

Database Management - Design and manage databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, or Redis. - Implement database optimization, indexing, and caching strategies. - Handle database migrations and data synchronization across services.

DevOps & Cloud - Deploy applications using Docker and Kubernetes. - Manage CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Jenkins, or Azure DevOps. - Work with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP. - Monitor applications using Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, or OpenTelemetry.

Security & Quality Assurance - Implement secure coding practices. - Perform code reviews and maintain coding standards. - Develop automated unit, integration, and end-to-end tests. - Ensure compliance with security and data privacy standards.

Preferred Skills

Frontend - React.js / Angular / Vue.js - HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript - Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, Material UI

Backend - Node.js (Express/NestJS) - Java Spring Boot / .NET Core / Python FastAPI - REST API & GraphQL - JWT, OAuth2, Keycloak

Databases - PostgreSQL - MySQL - MongoDB - Redis

Microservices & Messaging - Docker - Kubernetes - Kafka - RabbitMQ - MQTT - API Gateway

DevOps & Cloud - AWS / Azure / GCP - Jenkins / GitHub Actions - Terraform (Preferred) - Nginx

Version Control - Git - GitHub / GitLab / Bitbucket

Preferred Qualifications

  • Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field.
  • Experience with Domain-Driven Design (DDD).
  • Experience building SaaS products.
  • Knowledge of AI/ML integration and LLM APIs is an advantage.
  • Experience in Agile/Scrum methodologies.
summary: Seeking a Full Stack Developer with 3–8 years of experience in microservices architecture, cloud deployment, and DevOps practices. Must have expertise in React.js, Node.js, and Docker for scalable application development.

job_description:
Simplogics Solutions (P) Ltd

Address: #343, Third Floor, Nila Building, Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, 695581 Website: http://www.simplogics.com Closing Date: 30, June 2026 Published Date: 06, June 2026 Contact Email: roshni@simplogics.com

Role Overview

Design scalable data solutions and architect modern data ecosystems, including cloud data warehouses, lakehouse platforms, and medallion architectures using dimensional models (Star/Snowflake). Develop and govern data models, frameworks, and standards for structured data storage, access, and sharing across the organization. Maintain a centralized data dictionary.

  • Ensure Standards and Innovation:

  • Expertise: Data architecture, modeling (ERDs, dimensional modeling), and cross-system integration.
  • Tools: Proficiency in data pipelines (Azure Data Factory, Coalesce, Snowpipe), version control (GitLab), BI tools (Tableau, Python, R), and DataOps/DevOps automation (Terraform, ARM).
  • Leadership: Strong communication, stakeholder management, and cross-functional team collaboration.
  • Governance: Knowledge of data governance, security, and best practices.
  • Innovation: Familiarity with AI/ML platforms (Azure ML, Copilot, Claude, OpenAI) is preferred.

Apply

Contact: roshni@simplogics.com

job_description:
KENLAND IT SOLUTIONS (P) Ltd

Address: 3rd & 5th FLOORS, M SQUARED BUILDING, ANNEX 2, TECHNOPARK CAMPUS, KARIYAVATTOM, TRIVANDRUM, KERALA, 695581 Website: https://www.kenland.in

Job Title: Dot Net Developer Closing Date: 15, June 2026 Published Date: 06, June 2026 Contact Email: recruiter@kenland.in

Brief Description

We are seeking a junior ASP.NET Developer with 1+ years of experience to join our development team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining web applications using ASP.NET MVC and .Net Core.

Responsibilities

  • Develop, test, and deploy ASP.NET MVC applications.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and implement new features.
  • Debug and resolve software issues to ensure optimal performance.
  • Participate in code reviews and follow best coding practices.
  • Maintain and improve existing applications, identifying areas for optimization.
  • Stay updated with the latest technologies and ASP.NET best practices.
  • Document code and technical designs for future reference.
  • Provide basic technical support and troubleshooting for applications in production.

Preferred Skills

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • Strong knowledge of C# programming language.
  • Experience in software development with .NET Core.
  • Familiarity with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and jQuery.
  • Basic experience with front-end frameworks like Bootstrap.
  • Understanding of relational databases, Entity Framework, and ORM tools (Dapper).
  • Knowledge of version control systems like Git.
  • Good problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
  • Ability to work effectively in a collaborative team environment.
  • A positive attitude, willingness to learn, and adaptability to project requirements.
  • Basic understanding of object-oriented programming (OOP) principles.
  • Experience in writing SQL queries and working with relational databases.
  • Exposure to RESTful APIs and Web Services.
  • Understanding of Agile methodologies.
  • Knowledge of cloud platforms like Azure.
summary: Junior ASP.NET Developer needed for designing and maintaining web apps using .NET Core and MVC. Requires 1+ years experience and strong C# skills.

job_description:
Spericorn Technology (P) Ltd

Location: Amstor Building, Technopark Phase I, Trivandrum, 695581 Website: http://www.spericorn.com Closing Date: 30, June 2026 Job Published: 06, June 2026 Contact Email: careers@spericorn.com

Brief Description

We are seeking an experienced Project Delivery Manager (PDM) to oversee end-to-end project execution, ensuring successful delivery within scope, budget, and timelines. The PDM will act as a key bridge between clients, internal teams, and stakeholders, driving operational excellence and client satisfaction.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage multiple projects simultaneously from initiation to closure.
  • Define project scope, objectives, timelines, and deliverables in collaboration with stakeholders.
  • Ensure projects are delivered on time, within budget, and aligned with quality standards.
  • Lead cross-functional teams, assign responsibilities, and track progress.
  • Identify risks, issues, and dependencies, implementing mitigation strategies.
  • Maintain strong communication with clients, ensuring transparency and satisfaction.
  • Monitor project performance using appropriate tools and report to senior management.
  • Drive process improvements and best practices in project delivery.

Preferred Skills

  • Bachelor’s degree in Engineering/Management/IT or related field.
  • 5+ years of proven experience in project delivery/management roles.
  • Strong knowledge of project management methodologies.
  • Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Proficiency in project management tools.
  • Ability to handle pressure, multitask, and adapt in a fast-paced environment.

What We Offer

  • Competitive salary & benefits.
  • Opportunity to lead impactful projects with global clients.
  • Collaborative work environment with growth opportunities.

Note: Kindly mention in the email subject "Application for the post of Project Delivery Manager"
summary: Lead end-to-end project execution, ensuring delivery within scope, budget, and timelines while bridging clients and teams for operational excellence and satisfaction.
